text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


It's not at all clear to me that your patch would change anything, and 
I cannot reproduce any errors when using the command line you suggested. 

Can you please paste an example of the command line you're using, any 
variables that might be in a portmaster rc file, and the output of any 
errors that you're getting? (With stock portmaster 2.22.) 


Thanks, 

Doug
